---
title: "摘要"
number-sections: false
---

# 摘要 {.unnumbered}

这里是中文摘要内容。

随着海洋强国战略的深入实施......（此处填入你的摘要）

**关键词：** 联邦学习，知识图谱，实体对齐，海洋法

# Abstract {.unnumbered}

Here is the English abstract.

With the implementation of the strategy of maritime power...

**Keywords:** Federated Learning, Knowledge Graph, Entity Alignment, Law of the Sea
